title: Adult Residential Treatment Facilities - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Adult Residential Treatment Facilities 8 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF KAIROS KAIROS CADENZA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 4385 Sunnyside Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS KAIROS MOMENTUM RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 1920 Kurtz Lane Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS KAIROS TEMPO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOME RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential treatment home that houses five young adults with serious mental and behavioral disorders. The facility is non-secure. Residents receive intensive mental health services geared toward helping them develop the thinking and coping skills that will assist them in making the transition to adulthood. Staff help them learn to navigate the work and/or education worlds and to develop skills that enable them to attend school, work, and live independently in the community. 348 Ruby Avenue Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Ages 17-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 520-1332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH WASHBURN PHOENIX PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides respite, residential care, and treatment for adults experiencing emotional and mental health crisis. 725 Washburn Way Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWAYS INC LIFEWAYS INC MCNARY PLACE MCNARY PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential acute psychiatric facility. 290 Willamette Avenue Umatilla, OR 97882 Eligibility: Adults who have severe mental health conditions Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 922-0880 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PATH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help accessing treatment for substance use disorder (SUD), including outpatient or residential care, detox and withdrawal management, harm reduction, problem gambling services, and ongoing recovery supports. Applicants may self-refer. Care coordination and culturally-specific care coordination for African-American, Latinx, and LGBTQIA2S+ clients. Services for people living with HIV. 209 SW 4th Avenue Suite 520 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Must be experiencing SUD issues and having trouble accessing care, no matter what stage of change they are in. Clients must also be: -Involved or at risk of involvement with law enforcement -Houseless or at risk of becoming houseless due to substance use -Willing to work on recovery goals and/or harm reduction -Willing to engage in behavioral health services Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-9426 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a co-occurring (mental health and addictions) treatment facility, specializing in providing secure psychiatric and addictions stabilization and respite services. 320 SW Ramsey Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults determined to have a chronic mental illness who are experiencing a psychiatric emergency and who may have co-occurring disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential services for individuals with severe and persistent mental illness who are also medically fragile. Services include 24/7 nursing, medication management, case management, and active therapy. 606 Medical Parkway Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Call for information Hours: Monday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 7am-7pm, Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-noon, Saturday 9am-1pm (541) 426-4524 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES KAIROS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT HOMES KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PHOENIX PLACE LIFEWAYS INC MCNARY PLACE MULTNOMAH COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PATH OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER WALLOWA VALLEY CENTER FOR WELLNESS RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT
